revision.comment: Bot: migrate talk page structure; import discussion seed (ja:大辞林, en:Daijirin); add local discussion section + dated import note
revision.text:
{{talk page header}}
<!-- This talk page covers the main article and all associated namespace layers --> <!-- Imported from Japanese/English/Simple English Wikipedia talk pages on 2026-02-26 (UTC) when available. -->
== Local discussion == :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 03:05, 26 February 2026 (UTC) <!-- Add local discussion below this line. -->
== Imported from Japanese Wikipedia (2026-02-26, [https://ja.wikipedia.org/wiki/Special:PermanentLink/67090956 revision]) == :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 03:05, 26 February 2026 (UTC) <!-- Source: ja:Talk:大辞林 | revid=67090956 --> == 概要の「現代語義を優先」について == 「要出典」とあったので探してみたら「現代語義優先の記述方法をとっています」という記述を 「[http://dictionary.sanseido-publ.co.jp/dicts/ja/djr/djrColumn2.html 大辞林第2版の魅力 - 大辞林第二版をひらく]」というインタビュー記事に見つけました。ただ広辞苑との比較で広辞苑が「歴史的記述優先方式」とする出典は見つけてないので、どう追記したらよいのか判らないので、ノートに書き残しておきます。 --[[利用者:やんも|やんも]]（[[利用者‐会話:やんも|会話]]） 2018年1月23日 (火) 20:53 (UTC) :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 03:05, 26 February 2026 (UTC)
== Imported from English Wikipedia (2026-02-26, [https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Special:PermanentLink/1251890492 revision]) == :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 03:05, 26 February 2026 (UTC) <!-- Source: en:Talk:Daijirin | revid=1251890492 --> {{WikiProject banner shell|class=Start|1= {{WikiProject Japan|importance=low|bibliography=y}} {{WikiProject Books|referencework=yes}} {{WikiProject Linguistics|importance=Low|applied=Yes|applied-importance=|auto=Inherit}} }}
== Article with name ==
It seems to me that ''Daijirin'' is a name, like [[Shotokutaishi]] or [[Doraemon]], and it is therefore odd to use an English article with it. In general we do not use articles with English names, except where this forms a descriptive noun phrase in English -- such as "The Shorter Oxford". So I am about to remove all definite articles from the titles (including the forerunner dictionaries). [[User:Imaginatorium|Imaginatorium]] ([[User talk:Imaginatorium|talk]]) 12:07, 5 January 2015 (UTC)
:Including the definite article before dictionary names is standard usage (for instance, see [[Dictionary#History]]). [[User:Keahapana|Keahapana]] ([[User talk:Keahapana|talk]]) 19:04, 5 January 2015 (UTC) :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 03:05, 26 February 2026 (UTC)

{{talk page header}}
<!-- This talk page covers the main article and all associated namespace layers --> <!-- Imported from Japanese/English/Simple English Wikipedia talk pages on 2026-02-26 (UTC) when available. -->
== Local discussion == :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 03:05, 26 February 2026 (UTC) <!-- Add local discussion below this line. -->
== Imported from Japanese Wikipedia (2026-02-26, [https://ja.wikipedia.org/wiki/Special:PermanentLink/67090956 revision]) == :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 03:05, 26 February 2026 (UTC) <!-- Source: ja:Talk:大辞林 | revid=67090956 --> == 概要の「現代語義を優先」について == 「要出典」とあったので探してみたら「現代語義優先の記述方法をとっています」という記述を 「[http://dictionary.sanseido-publ.co.jp/dicts/ja/djr/djrColumn2.html 大辞林第2版の魅力 - 大辞林第二版をひらく]」というインタビュー記事に見つけました。ただ広辞苑との比較で広辞苑が「歴史的記述優先方式」とする出典は見つけてないので、どう追記したらよいのか判らないので、ノートに書き残しておきます。 --[[User:やんも|やんも]]（[[利用者‐会話:やんも|会話]]） 2018年1月23日 (火) 20:53 (UTC) :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 03:05, 26 February 2026 (UTC)
== Imported from English Wikipedia (2026-02-26, [https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Special:PermanentLink/1251890492 revision]) == :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 03:05, 26 February 2026 (UTC) <!-- Source: en:Talk:Daijirin | revid=1251890492 --> {{WikiProject banner shell|class=Start|1= {{WikiProject Japan|importance=low|bibliography=y}} {{WikiProject Books|referencework=yes}} {{WikiProject Linguistics|importance=Low|applied=Yes|applied-importance=|auto=Inherit}} }}
== Article with name ==
It seems to me that ''Daijirin'' is a name, like [[Shotokutaishi]] or [[Doraemon]], and it is therefore odd to use an English article with it. In general we do not use articles with English names, except where this forms a descriptive noun phrase in English -- such as "The Shorter Oxford". So I am about to remove all definite articles from the titles (including the forerunner dictionaries). [[User:Imaginatorium|Imaginatorium]] ([[User talk:Imaginatorium|talk]]) 12:07, 5 January 2015 (UTC)
:Including the definite article before dictionary names is standard usage (for instance, see [[Dictionary#History]]). [[User:Keahapana|Keahapana]] ([[User talk:Keahapana|talk]]) 19:04, 5 January 2015 (UTC) :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 03:05, 26 February 2026 (UTC)

revision.comment: [[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] previous contributors were [[User:en>Billjones94]], [[User:Immanuelle]], [[User:EmmaBot]], see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Daijirin here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]]

Last refreshed: [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]] --> {{talk page header}}
<!-- This talk page covers the main article and all associated namespace layers --> <!-- Imported from Japanese/English/Simple English Wikipedia talk pages on 2026-02-26 (UTC) when available. -->
== Local discussion == :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 03:05, 26 February 2026 (UTC) <!-- Add local discussion below this line. -->
== Imported from Japanese Wikipedia (2026-02-26, [https://ja.wikipedia.org/wiki/Special:PermanentLink/67090956 revision]) == :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 03:05, 26 February 2026 (UTC) <!-- Source: ja:Talk:大辞林 | revid=67090956 --> == 概要の「現代語義を優先」について == 「要出典」とあったので探してみたら「現代語義優先の記述方法をとっています」という記述を 「[http://dictionary.sanseido-publ.co.jp/dicts/ja/djr/djrColumn2.html 大辞林第2版の魅力 - 大辞林第二版をひらく]」というインタビュー記事に見つけました。ただ広辞苑との比較で広辞苑が「歴史的記述優先方式」とする出典は見つけてないので、どう追記したらよいのか判らないので、ノートに書き残しておきます。 --[[User:やんも|やんも]]（[[利用者‐会話:やんも|会話]]） 2018年1月23日 (火) 20:53 (UTC) :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 03:05, 26 February 2026 (UTC)
== Imported from English Wikipedia (2026-02-26, [https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Special:PermanentLink/1251890492 revision]) == :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 03:05, 26 February 2026 (UTC) <!-- Source: en:Talk:Daijirin | revid=1251890492 --> {{WikiProject banner shell|class=Start|1= {{WikiProject Japan|importance=low|bibliography=y}} {{WikiProject Books|referencework=yes}} {{WikiProject Linguistics|importance=Low|applied=Yes|applied-importance=|auto=Inherit}} }}
== Article with name ==
It seems to me that ''Daijirin'' is a name, like [[Shotokutaishi]] or [[Doraemon]], and it is therefore odd to use an English article with it. In general we do not use articles with English names, except where this forms a descriptive noun phrase in English -- such as "The Shorter Oxford". So I am about to remove all definite articles from the titles (including the forerunner dictionaries). [[User:Imaginatorium|Imaginatorium]] ([[User talk:Imaginatorium|talk]]) 12:07, 5 January 2015 (UTC)
:Including the definite article before dictionary names is standard usage (for instance, see [[Dictionary#History]]). [[User:Keahapana|Keahapana]] ([[User talk:Keahapana|talk]]) 19:04, 5 January 2015 (UTC) :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 03:05, 26 February 2026 (UTC)
